description: Copy of a legal query and responsum of Elḥanan b. Ḥushiel (of Qayrawān). Published by Jacob Mann, "The Responsa of the Babylonian Geonim as a Source of Jewish History," JQR New Series Vol. 9 (1918), 139–79. This was written on a reused sheet of accounting in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals; might be a fiscal account, based on the layout.
description_he: שאלה משפטית בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
